- Right C-shape: expands/shrinks in the direction the C opens (right)

Hmm, this is confusing. Let me try a different approach: click the right C-shape in the sky blue container to see if it shrinks the sky blue bar.
Actually, I already did that earlier, and it expanded the sky blue bar downward. So the right C-shape expands downward, and the left C-shape expands upward.

Actually, let me step back and think about the goal differently. Maybe the goal is to make the multi-colored object's yellow bar and N bar match the L-shape's horizontal and vertical bars in size and position.
